CV

Your Name

MIT rising senior · CADD-AI for Science researcher Cambridge, MA · you@example.com · GitHub · LinkedIn

Education

Massachusetts Institute of Technology — B.S. Candidate Expected 2027

  • Focus: AI for science, computational drug discovery, machine learning, and scientific computing.
  • Relevant coursework: algorithms, machine learning, chemistry/biology electives, probability, statistics.

  • Replace this bullet with your exact research contribution.

Projects

Molecular Property Modeling Prototype project

  • Built a reproducible modeling pipeline for molecular property prediction.
  • Compared baselines against stronger architectures using held-out validation.
  • Documented failure modes, metrics, and next-step experiments.

Essay Archive Public writing project

  • Designed and maintained a personal archive for essays, research notes, and project writeups.

Skills

  • Programming: Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, SQL, Bash
